LSE-HS11-L4-1400P-HSALG2-AGS-GBL-02 • HS Math Algebra II • Complex Solutions of Quadratic Equations

The Same Equation Everywhere

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher’s panel discussion about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about the topic of the teacher’s lesson, support that claim with specific reasoning drawn from what he says about the three cultural traditions, and articulate the conclusion that follows about how the same mathematical idea emerges across different cultures.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS HSN.CN.A.7  |  HS Math Algebra II: Complex Solutions of Quadratic Equations
